genre_refs: Black Friday / Fashion Friday seasonal shopping theme
description: A designed vertical public-service infographic with a Black Friday / holiday-shopping theme ('Fashion Friday' per the tweet). The background is a dim photograph of a person reclining and holding a tablet/phone displaying a 'FASHION OUTLET' online store page with category tabs (TOPS, DRESSES, JEANS, JACKETS, COATS, LINGERIE, SWIM, SPORTS, ACCESSORIES), a model in a red top, and a red 'BLACK FRIDAY SALE' with a 'SHOP NOW' button. Overlaid on the dark left/lower area, a bold red headline reads 'Avoid scams.' followed by a white bulleted list (each bullet a red dot): 'Buy from reputable manufacturers and stores.' / 'Research online sellers you aren't familiar with.' / 'Be suspicious of websites that do not provide a toll-free contact number. Verify that the phone number works.' / 'Keep a record of your purchases and compare them to your statements. Report discrepancies immediately.' / 'Don't buy expensive items from third-party sellers.' At the bottom are the DHS seal, the white 'ICE' wordmark, and text 'ICE Homeland Security Investigations investigates commercial fraud. Report scams: 866-DHS-2-ICE'.
notable_text: Avoid scams. Buy from reputable manufacturers and stores; Research online sellers you aren't familiar with; ICE Homeland Security Investigations investigates commercial fraud. Report scams: 866-DHS-2-ICE
